title: Apex 4.0 EOD vs Intraday Drawdown (2026): The Day-One Choice You Can't Undo
description: Apex Trader Funding 4.0 lets you pick EOD or Intraday trailing drawdown at purchase — and you can't switch later. Honest 2026 breakdown of how each rule actually behaves, three worked examples, and how to choose without the marketing spin.

og.title: Apex 4.0 EOD vs Intraday Drawdown: The Day-One Choice You Can't Undo
og.description: The mechanic-level difference between Apex EOD and Apex Intraday, with three real scenarios that show which trader profile wins on each. Free trailing-DD calculator included.
